name: PizzaForces
input:
The first line contains a single integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 10^4$) — the number of testcases.
Each testcase consists of a single line that contains a single integer $n$ ($1 \le n \le 10^{16}$) — the number of Petya's friends.
output: For each testcase, print one integer — the minimum number of minutes that is needed to bake pizzas containing at least $n$ slices in total.
